active.rewards: 50 Power Shard + 75 Passive Shard + 14 Secret Chest + 125 Clan Reroll + 12 Aura Crate + 10 Cosmetic Crate
active.notes: Revalidated June 4, 2026. Destructoid updated June 4 and lists it active; GamesRadar June 2 and PC Gamer June 2 also keep it active, and Beebom, Dexerto, Pro Game Guides, Pocket Gamer, PCGamesN, and Game.guide/snapshot pages support it as current or recent. Beebom, Dexerto, PC Gamer, and Game.guide support the stored 14 Secret Chest / 125 Clan Reroll / 12 Aura Crate / 10 Cosmetic Crate reward bundle; PCGamesN still conflicts with a smaller swapped bundle. GamesRadar remains the clearest level 12,500 source. No redeem test was performed.
